set.name: The Sundering
set.note: Set 1. Flavor follows docs/STORY.md tone rules.

cards.name: Verdant Wellspring
cards.flavor: Every root drinks from the same buried light.

cards.name: Sylvaris Sproutling
cards.flavor: Every ending in Sylvaris is a seed.

cards.name: Thornhide Boar
cards.flavor: It eats thorns and dreams of iron.

cards.name: Rootwall Guardian
cards.flavor: The wall was never built. It grew, and it remembers why.

cards.name: Grovewarden Stag
cards.text: Rampage. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: "The old forest does not fear the dark. It simply grows through it." — Thornmaw

cards.name: Canopy Stalker
cards.flavor: Above the mist, patience wears fur.

cards.name: Wildheart Guardian
cards.flavor: It sleeps standing, and it never truly sleeps.

cards.name: Elderwood Colossus
cards.flavor: Older than the Sundering. Old enough to have heard the star sing.

cards.name: Verdant Surge
cards.text: Add 2 Aether this turn. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The land answers those who listen.

cards.name: Lifebloom
cards.flavor: Where the wound was, a garden.

cards.name: Primal Roar
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Unit you control.
cards.flavor: One voice, ten thousand throats.

cards.name: Overgrowth Crush
cards.flavor: Sylvaris keeps no ruins. It keeps compost.

cards.name: Thornmaw, Wild Patriarch
cards.text: Alert, Rampage. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: He guards the Shard. Ask him from what, and his silence will frighten you.

cards.name: Grove Whisperer
cards.text: When {name} enters, add 1 Verdance Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: She asks the roots politely. They have never once said no.

cards.name: Moss Colossus
cards.flavor: Mountains envy its patience.

cards.name: Sylvan Archer
cards.text: Intercept. When {name} enters, deal 1 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: Their arrows return to the soil. Eventually, so does everything.

cards.name: World-Oak Sapling
cards.flavor: In a thousand years it will hold up the sky. Today it holds the line.

cards.name: Renewal Rain
cards.text: Restore 4 Health to you. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The Grove does not weep. It waters.

cards.name: Thorn Lash
cards.flavor: Beautiful, the briar. Briefly.

cards.name: Feral Awakening
cards.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on each Unit you control.
cards.flavor: The blight came at midnight. By dawn, the forest had teeth.

cards.name: Deeproot Guardian
cards.flavor: Below the deepest root, something warm is buried. It is best not to dig.

cards.name: Emerald Warden
cards.flavor: The oath is older than the language it was sworn in.

cards.name: Heartwood Ancient
cards.flavor: "We remember when you were one voice. We miss you." — the Voice, to no one

cards.name: Nature's Bounty
cards.flavor: The Grove pays its debts in seasons.

cards.name: Warden's Vigil
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target Unit. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Thornmaw has not slept in a thousand years. Someone must not.

cards.name: Pyre Wellspring
cards.flavor: Ashmar was built around a wound that burns.

cards.name: Cinder Imp
cards.flavor: Small hands. Endless appetite.

cards.name: Ashblade Raider
cards.flavor: In Ashmar, hesitation is the only sin with a name.

cards.name: Sparkcaller
cards.text: When {name} enters, deal 1 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: Every spark is a prayer. Every prayer is answered.

cards.name: Emberfang Raptor
cards.text: Rush. When {name} enters, deal 1 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: It hunts where the ash still glows.

cards.name: Flamewake Berserker
cards.flavor: He was fast before the fire. Now the fire runs to keep up.

cards.name: Magma Behemoth
cards.flavor: The mountain did not erupt. It stood up.

cards.name: Ember Colossus
cards.flavor: Kaelis forged it to outlast the forge. She may regret succeeding.

cards.name: Cinder Bolt
cards.flavor: Ashmar diplomacy.

cards.name: Lavaburst
cards.flavor: The ground keeps its grudges close to the surface.

cards.name: Wildfire
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to each enemy Unit.
cards.flavor: Fire holds no councils and hears no appeals.

cards.name: Flame Scry
cards.text: Deal 1 damage to any target. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The flames show the future. It is always burning.

cards.name: Kaelis Emberborn
cards.text: Rush, Swiftstrike. When {name} enters, deal 2 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: "The forge is dying. I will not bury my people beside it."

cards.name: Forge Acolyte
cards.text: When {name} enters, add 1 Pyre Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: He tends a fire that beats like a heart. He has stopped mentioning this.

cards.name: Cinderwing Drake
cards.flavor: Its shadow arrives scorched.

cards.name: Ashmar Warhound
cards.flavor: Loyal to the whistle. Deaf to the leash.

cards.name: Emberstorm
cards.text: Deal 3 damage to each enemy Unit.
cards.flavor: When the forge coughed, three villages learned new constellations.

cards.name: Molten Spear
cards.flavor: Forged at dawn, thrown by noon, legend by nightfall.

cards.name: Sunforge Zealot
cards.flavor: He loves the warmth. He has never asked what is warming.

cards.name: Flare Djinn
cards.flavor: It grants one wish: brevity.

cards.name: Pyroclast Titan
cards.flavor: "We dreamed of holding the world. Some of our fingers still twitch." — the Voice

cards.name: Spark Dancer
cards.flavor: The audience applauds. The audience keeps a safe distance.

cards.name: The First Flame
cards.text: Add 3 Pyre Aether this turn. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: It has burned for a thousand years. It has cooled for ten.

cards.name: Ashen Rally
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Unit you control.
cards.flavor: Kaelis does not give speeches. She points.

cards.name: Kaelis' Judgment
cards.flavor: Her verdicts are brief, luminous, and final.

cards.name: Tide Wellspring
cards.flavor: All rivers remember the same first rain.

cards.name: Skyfin Scout
cards.flavor: The sky is only a thinner sea.

cards.name: Mistcaller Adept
cards.flavor: Knowledge arrives like fog: quietly, and over everything.

cards.name: Depth Watcher
cards.flavor: It watches the abyss. Lately, the shifts feel shorter.

cards.name: Current Rider
cards.flavor: Meridine's couriers outrun the news they carry.

cards.name: Wavecrash Djinn
cards.flavor: It signs its work in salt on every window of the city.

cards.name: Tidebound Serpent
cards.flavor: The harbor chain was built to keep it out. It thinks the chain is jewelry.

cards.name: Abyssal Tidewyrm
cards.text: Aegis 2. When {name} enters, return target enemy Unit to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: The deep keeps its own counsel.

cards.name: Undertow
cards.text: Return target Unit to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: Every tide returns what the shore tried to keep.

cards.name: Insight
cards.flavor: Two pages. The Archive is missing two pages.

cards.name: Mind Spiral
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: What Meridine learns, someone else forgets.

cards.name: Tidal Slam
cards.text: Return target Unit to its owner's hand. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The sea files its objections in person.

cards.name: Archivist Numen
cards.flavor: "The vandal's handwriting is mine. The question is: whose was the mercy?"

cards.name: Meridine Scribe
cards.text: When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: He copies everything twice: once for the Archive, once for the tide.

cards.name: Pearl Sentinel
cards.flavor: Grown, not built. Meridine plants its walls.

cards.name: Storm Djinn
cards.flavor: Weather is merely its rough draft.

cards.name: Glimpse the Verse
cards.flavor: For one breath, she heard the world-song whole. She has been quiet since.

cards.name: Tempest Call
cards.text: Return all enemy Units to their owner's hand.
cards.flavor: The harbor emptied politely, all at once.

cards.name: Depth Horror
cards.flavor: The Archive lists it as myth. The Archive is edited.

cards.name: Tidebinder
cards.text: When {name} enters, return target enemy Unit to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: Go home, says the sea, and the sea is rarely refused.

cards.name: Erased Record
cards.flavor: Whatever the page said, the ocean has it now.

cards.name: Currentshield Mystic
cards.flavor: Water yields. Then it is a wall. Then it yields again.

cards.name: Numen's Paradox
cards.flavor: He wrote the warning. He erased the warning. Both were correct.

cards.name: Skywave Rider
cards.flavor: Where wave meets wind, Meridine posts its sentries.

cards.name: The Immutable Archive
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: Nothing written here can be altered. Two pages are missing.

cards.name: Dawn Wellspring
cards.flavor: The Concord guards the dawn. From what, no scripture says.

cards.name: Dawnlit Recruit
cards.flavor: On his first watch he saluted the sunrise. Everyone does, once.

cards.name: Aurelian Shieldmaiden
cards.text: Alert. When {name} enters, restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: Dawn holds the line so others may see it.

cards.name: Bastion Wall
cards.flavor: The Concord builds outward-facing walls around an inward-facing secret.

cards.name: Beacon Griffin
cards.flavor: It circles the spire at night, though no order requires it.

cards.name: Lightbringer Vanguard
cards.flavor: They march at first light, when the shadows are longest.

cards.name: Radiant Champion
cards.flavor: Every blow she lands feels, faintly, like being forgiven.

cards.name: Seraphel's Chosen
cards.flavor: They were not recruited. One morning, they simply were.

cards.name: Consecrate
cards.flavor: The light asks nothing in return. This is what worries the scholars.

cards.name: Purifying Light
cards.flavor: What the dawn touches, the night releases.

cards.name: Rally the Dawn
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Unit you control. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: One horn, and the morning arrives armed.

cards.name: Dawn's Reckoning
cards.flavor: There is a sunrise no shadow survives. The Concord prays it never comes twice.

cards.name: Seraphel, the Lightkeeper
cards.flavor: "I have no memory of being born. The Concord calls this holiness."

cards.name: Dawnblade Adept
cards.flavor: First light strikes first.

cards.name: Aurelian Standard-Bearer
cards.text: When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: The banner shows a halo. Look closely: it is drawn as a lock.

cards.name: Sunspire Colossus
cards.flavor: It kneels only at the spire, facing not the sun, but the vault beneath.

cards.name: Radiant Verdict
cards.flavor: Judgment at the speed of light.

cards.name: Morning Prayer
cards.text: Restore 3 Health to you. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Every prayer is answered. The Concord has stopped asking by whom.

cards.name: Temple Guard
cards.flavor: His post is a door that has never been opened. His orders: never.

cards.name: Lightwing Messenger
cards.flavor: It carries sealed letters between people who have never written any.

cards.name: Warden's Oath
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target Unit. Restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The oath has five signatures. Four of the names are dust.

cards.name: Halo Sentinel
cards.flavor: Its halo turns like a key that has not finished turning.

cards.name: The Silent Choir
cards.flavor: They mouth the hymns. No one has heard their true voices. This is policy.

cards.name: Consecrated Ground
cards.flavor: Stand here long enough and your wounds close. Your questions, too.

cards.name: Seraphel's Descent
cards.text: Destroy target Unit. Restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: She descends gently, the way dawn does. The outcome is the same as lightning.

cards.name: Gloom Wellspring
cards.flavor: The Hollow's wells run deep, and something down there pays the water back.

cards.name: Hollow Rat
cards.flavor: Small enough to ignore. Once.

cards.name: Duskblade Cutthroat
cards.flavor: Nyxhollow's mercy: you will not hear it coming.

cards.name: Carrion Bat
cards.flavor: It maps the Hollow by grief: the fresher, the brighter.

cards.name: Venom Stalker
cards.flavor: One bite. The rest is patience.

cards.name: Nyxhollow Reaper
cards.text: Venom, Dread. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: What the Hollow takes, it keeps.

cards.name: Dread Wraith
cards.flavor: It remembers being a person. It does not recommend it.

cards.name: Hollow Titan
cards.flavor: Ravenna built it from everything her kingdom threw away, including the truth.

cards.name: Wither
cards.flavor: Autumn, delivered.

cards.name: Soul Drain
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to any target. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The Hollow wastes nothing. Especially not endings.

cards.name: Doom Mark
cards.flavor: The mark is a courtesy. The outcome was decided earlier.

cards.name: Ravenna's Bargain
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. {name} deals 2 damage to you.
cards.flavor: Her contracts are honest. That is what makes them terrifying.

cards.name: Ravenna Duskveil
cards.text: Dread, Venom. When {name} enters, target opponent discards 2 cards.
cards.flavor: "Hate me thoroughly. It keeps you far from the door I guard."

cards.name: Duskveil Cultist
cards.flavor: He joined for the robes. He stays because the whispers use his mother's voice.

cards.name: Bonepile Ghoul
cards.flavor: Nyxhollow's dead work night shifts.

cards.name: Nyx Shade
cards.flavor: Moonlight, curdled.

cards.name: Plaguebearer
cards.flavor: It carries the blight gently, like a lantern.

cards.name: Grave Whispers
cards.text: Target opponent discards a card. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The dead gossip. Ravenna listens, and files everything.

cards.name: Deathbloom
cards.text: Destroy target Unit. {name} deals 1 damage to you.
cards.flavor: In the Hollow's gardens, every flower opens exactly once.

cards.name: Hollow Colossus
cards.flavor: "We felt them build it from our shed skin. We were flattered." — the Voice

cards.name: Soul Feast
cards.text: Deal 3 damage to any target. Restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The Hollow's table is always set.

cards.name: Veil of Thorns
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to target Unit. Add 1 Gloom Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: Ravenna's roses draw blood and interest.

cards.name: The Last Warden
cards.flavor: A thousand years of thankless watch, paid one seal at a time.

cards.name: Midnight Reaper
cards.flavor: It harvests at midnight because that is when the leaks begin.

cards.name: Whispered Pact
cards.text: Draw a card. {name} deals 1 damage to you.
cards.flavor: "A small price. We are patient about the rest." — the Voice

cards.name: Sylvan Saplings
cards.text: When {name} enters, add 1 Verdance Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: The Grove counts its children in thousands.

cards.name: Bloomcaller
cards.text: When {name} enters, restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: She sings, and the wounds forget themselves.

cards.name: Bramblewolf
cards.flavor: Its coat is thorns. Its patience is winter.

cards.name: Wildgrowth
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target Unit.
cards.flavor: A season, hurried.

cards.name: Thornback Ravager
cards.flavor: It does not stop at the fence. It does not notice the fence.

cards.name: Sylvan Blessing
cards.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target Unit.
cards.flavor: Thornmaw's favor is heavy to carry, and worth the weight.

cards.name: Grovemother's Gift
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Add 1 Verdance Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: The oldest roots remember every name the forest ever held.

cards.name: Ancient of Roots
cards.text: Intercept. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: It kneels for no fire and bows to no crown.

cards.name: Verdant Cataclysm
cards.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on each Unit you control. Restore 4 Health to you.
cards.flavor: One spring, a hundred years wide.

cards.name: The World-Oak
cards.text: Intercept, Rampage. When {name} enters, put a +2/+2 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: Beneath its roots sleeps the emerald Shard. Above them sleeps the world.

cards.name: Elowen, the First Root
cards.text: Alert, Intercept. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control and restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The first of five to bind a Shard. She gave her voice to the roots, and the roots have not stopped grieving.

cards.name: Ashmar Whelp
cards.flavor: Born from a spark, dead by the second sunrise, glorious in between.

cards.name: Coalfist Brawler
cards.flavor: Ashmar settles arguments the honest way.

cards.name: Scorch
cards.text: Deal 1 damage to any target. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: A love letter, briefly.

cards.name: Emberkin Zealot
cards.flavor: "The forge is dying and you would have me wait?"

cards.name: Cinderstorm Rider
cards.flavor: The ash parts for her, or it burns with the rest.

cards.name: Pyre Rite
cards.text: Deal 3 damage to any target. Add 1 Pyre Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: Ashmar prays with kindling.

cards.name: Forgeborn Colossus
cards.flavor: Struck from the last of the forge's true heat.

cards.name: Meteor Strike
cards.flavor: The sky repays a debt no one remembers owing.

cards.name: Inferno Herald
cards.text: Swiftstrike. When {name} enters, deal 2 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: It announces the fire by being the fire.

cards.name: The Sun-Forge Avatar
cards.text: Rush, Rampage. When {name} enters, deal 3 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: The forge given legs. It does not know it is a wound.

cards.name: Vaelan, the First Flame
cards.text: Rush, Swiftstrike. When {name} enters, deal 4 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: He fed his own warmth into the crimson seal, and Ashmar has been cold at heart ever since.

cards.name: Reef Drifter
cards.flavor: It rides the high currents where sea forgets to be sea.

cards.name: Meridine Cartographer
cards.flavor: He maps the pages the Archive pretends it never had.

cards.name: Ripple
cards.text: Draw a card. Restore 1 Health to you.
cards.flavor: Small knowledge, gently kept.

cards.name: Coral Sentinel
cards.flavor: Grown to a purpose it will never be told.

cards.name: Tidal Scholar
cards.text: When {name} enters, draw a card. Target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: For every truth they learn, they choose one for you to lose.

cards.name: Backwash
cards.text: Return target Unit to its owner's hand. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The tide takes back what it lent, with interest in salt.

cards.name: Deepwater Oracle
cards.flavor: He reads the deep the way others read a face.

cards.name: Leviathan's Call
cards.text: Return all enemy Units to their owner's hand. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Something vast turned over in its sleep, and the shore was rearranged.

cards.name: Frostwake Serpent
cards.flavor: Cold as the vault where truth is drowned.

cards.name: The Immutable Codex
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Restore 3 Health to you. This spell can't be countered.
cards.flavor: Everything true is written here. So little of it is allowed to stay.

cards.name: Meridia, the First Tide
cards.text: Aegis 2. When {name} enters, draw 2 cards and return target enemy Unit to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: She poured her memory into the sea so the sea would remember what mortals must not.

cards.name: Dawn Acolyte
cards.text: When {name} enters, restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: First to the wall at first light.

cards.name: Gilded Footman
cards.flavor: The Concord issues armor, oaths, and questions it forbids you to ask.

cards.name: Warding Light
cards.text: Restore 3 Health to you. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The dawn keeps its own counsel and shares only warmth.

cards.name: Shieldwing Cleric
cards.flavor: Its halo is small. Its silence is not.

cards.name: Lightsworn Paladin
cards.flavor: Every wound he gives feels, to him, like forgiveness.

cards.name: Sanctify
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Unit you control.
cards.flavor: Blessed be the ranks, and blind.

cards.name: Aurelian Confessor
cards.text: Alert. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: He hears every sin but the Concord's own.

cards.name: Pillar of Judgment
cards.flavor: Light does not argue. Light arrives.

cards.name: Seraph of the Wall
cards.flavor: It has guarded the same door for a thousand years and forgotten what is behind it.

cards.name: The Hollow Halo
cards.text: Destroy all enemy Units. Restore 5 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The lock, and the light that hides it are one and the same.

cards.name: Auriel, the First Dawn
cards.text: Soar, Leech, Alert. When {name} enters, restore 4 Health to you and put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: She shaped the mercy of the fallen power into a guardian, then made herself forget she had. Seraphel wears her face and her forgetting both.

cards.name: Gravecrawler
cards.flavor: Nyxhollow does not bury its workers. It reassigns them.

cards.name: Shadow Adder
cards.flavor: One touch is a full conversation.

cards.name: Dark Bargain
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. {name} deals 2 damage to you.
cards.flavor: The Hollow always pays. You simply may not like the coin.

cards.name: Corpselight Wisp
cards.flavor: Follow it and you will not be lonely. You will not be anything.

cards.name: Rot Weaver
cards.text: Venom. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: It spins with what it takes from you.

cards.name: Drain Life
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to any target. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: What leaves you does not vanish. It changes hands.

cards.name: Duskveil Executioner
cards.flavor: Ravenna's law is quiet, and it always comes to visit.

cards.name: Annihilate
cards.text: Destroy target Unit. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The Hollow keeps a ledger. This is a line being closed.

cards.name: Wraithlord
cards.flavor: It remembers a name. It suspects the name was once its own.

cards.name: The Heartshard Whispers
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Target opponent discards 2 cards. {name} deals 3 damage to you.
cards.flavor: "Come closer. We have so much of you to give back." — the Voice

cards.name: Nyxara, the First Dark
cards.text: Dread, Venom, Leech. When {name} enters, target opponent discards 2 cards and {name} deals 3 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: The first First Caller, and the only one still breathing. Ravenna took her name and her thankless watch when the world forgot to.

cards.name: Feral Vigor
cards.text: Give target Unit +2/+3 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: The Grove lends its strength to those who stand for it — briefly, and completely.

cards.name: Reckless Charge
cards.text: Give target Unit +4/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: Ashmar has a word for caution. It is rarely used, and never twice.

cards.name: Fluid Guard
cards.text: Give target Unit +0/+4 until end of turn. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Water cannot be cut. Only briefly inconvenienced.

cards.name: Radiant Ward
cards.text: Give target Unit +1/+3 until end of turn. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The dawn shields first, and asks its questions never.

cards.name: Cruel Empowerment
cards.text: Give target Unit +3/+1 until end of turn.
cards.flavor: The Hollow's gifts always fit. That is the frightening part.

cards.name: Call of the Grove
cards.text: Create two 2/2 Bramble Wolf tokens with Intercept.
cards.flavor: Call once, and the thicket answers with teeth.

cards.name: Emberspawn
cards.text: Create two 1/1 Ember Imp tokens with Rush.
cards.flavor: The forge sheds sparks. The sparks resent being swept up.

cards.name: Chart the Depths
cards.text: Search your deck for a Wellspring and put it into your hand. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Meridine maps the sea-floor the way others map a memory.

cards.name: Muster the Faithful
cards.text: Create two 1/2 Recruit tokens with Alert.
cards.flavor: The Concord never lacks for the faithful. It lacks only for the honest.

cards.name: Vengeful Shade
cards.text: When {name} dies, it deals 2 damage to your opponent.
cards.flavor: Killing it only changes the shape of the problem.

cards.name: Nullwater
cards.flavor: Meridine does not argue with a spell. It decides the spell never happened.

cards.name: Hollow Silence
cards.text: Counter target spell. Your opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: The Hollow does not forbid the word. It removes the one who spoke it.
